text: Code reviews are a key practice in software development where team members check each other's code before it is added to the main project. This process is very important because it helps catch bugs early. Finding and fixing mistakes at this stage is much easier and cheaper than dealing with them later in production. Additionally, code reviews are a great opportunity for knowledge sharing. Developers can learn new techniques, understand different parts of the project, and give each other helpful feedback. This sharing of ideas improves everyone's skills and leads to higher team quality overall. Through regular reviews, the whole team grows stronger and produces better, more reliable software together.
